description: Rank velocity driver genes per cluster group via scv.tl.rank_velocity_genes(groupby, min_corr) — for each group, the genes whose velocity dynamics best explain its transitions — and export the per-group name table to CSV.
rules: read-only input — writes a new driver_genes.csv under record_store
requires a velocity graph and the GROUPBY column in adata.obs (e.g. clusters/leiden)
min_corr filters genes by velocity correlation (default 0.3)
usage: Set INPUT (velocity .h5ad). Optional: GROUPBY (default clusters), MIN_CORR (default 0.3). Output: driver_genes.csv.
limitation: Requires scvelo installed and the GROUPBY column present; without scvelo the porter writes a {} placeholder driver_genes.csv and still passes.
